title: Remer's pvp VM
description: The best PvP build in all of Minecraft.
body:
My PvP modpack, based on Vulcan Mod, offers a ton of benefits.

In addition to the BEST optimization, you get a customizable hotbar, crosshair, sound effects, particles, and even ping.
The modpack also includes BactroMod, which adds a lot of cosmetic features.

**AND YES, IF YOU'RE EXPERIENCING FREEZES ON SOME SERVERS, DISABLE THE MARLOW OPTIMIZER MOD.**
